_doc.purpose: Maps {{INJECTION_POINT}} keys to their value sources for bifrost-init hydration. Bound by ADR-006 §Hydration, ADR-008, ADR-010. CLI reads each template, finds {{KEYS}}, looks up values per the mapping below, and writes hydrated copies under .bifrost/.

value_sources.interview: answer collected by bifrost-init's interview (Path A/B/C in 02-INITIALIZATION.md)
value_sources.knowledge: extracted from a file under projects/bifrost-framework/knowledge/
value_sources.computed: generated at init time (uuid, timestamp, kebab-case slug, etc.)
value_sources.agent_fill: left as a placeholder in the hydrated artifact for an agent to fill at runtime (NOT replaced by the CLI). Currently used for TRAJECTORY locking fields and any field that requires runtime decisions.

_doc.canonical_artifact_set: Per ADR-010: PATIENT, TRAJECTORY, IMPACT, PLAN, STATE, CODE_REVIEW, QA_REPORT, HANDOFF, VITALS, PROJECT_CONTEXT. HEALTH and AUTONOMY removed (acceptance criteria live in TRAJECTORY §3; autonomy lives in STATE.md frontmatter).

PROJECT_CONTEXT.md._note: PROJECT_CONTEXT.md is project-level, not per-feature. Created once per project at first bifrost-init; not regenerated per feature. If keys are needed, they would come from a project-init flow rather than the per-feature interview.

_agent_templates._note: Agent templates not yet authored. Pedro's next pass. The keys below are placeholders for the template-writing phase.

Conductor_Template.md._note: Conductor reads STATE.md schema directly from bifrost-state-management Section A; no separate STATE_FORMAT injection needed. Autonomy level lives in STATE.md frontmatter (per ADR-010), not as a separate injection.
